requiredValidation: narrow real-browser validation for visible changes

nodes.closure: One Vite root, Vue root, Router, Pinia graph, QueryClient, token registry, and application shell.

nodes.sourceRole: canonical board-centric teaching composition and interaction authority
nodes.closure: Unified teaching workspace is active; source-specific duplicate workspace shells remain forbidden.

nodes.sourceRole: canonical board rendering, interaction, editor, annotation gesture, and motion authority
nodes.closure: CanonicalChessBoard and PgnChessBoard are the verified public board components; the board runtime is not duplicated by product modes.

nodes.sourceRole: canonical PGN parsing, collection, navigation, variation, comment, and serialization authority
nodes.closure: One framework-free PGN domain and one client-state owner are active. Target teaching-collection persistence is not yet implemented.

nodes.sourceRole: canonical node annotation, YCDW compatibility, drawing, and history authority
nodes.closure: PGN-node annotations use the canonical board/domain path; protected sources remain read-only.

nodes.sourceRole: canonical explicit analysis, evaluation, progress, cancellation, and stale-result authority
nodes.closure: Analysis is explicit and current task state is memory-only. Ongoing live contexts prohibit AI and evaluation; defaults remain OD-03 and OD-04.

nodes.sourceRole: canonical visual semantics with target-owned token normalization
nodes.closure: The token registry and light/dark/system theme engine are active. Accent, board appearance, locale, sound, and AI-default preference owners are not implemented.
Current persistence is limited to themeMode, exact workspace-layout fields, sanitized handoff context, and the strict kaisaile.auth.v1 exception. Query, analysis, and live state remain memory-only.

nodes.sourceRole: read-only Web tournament and account compatibility evidence from approved Web sources
nodes.closure: Public tournament reads and account login/identity are active within the confirmed Web contract. Write, admin, publish, and invented transport capabilities remain forbidden.

The current route displays confirmed public pairing information independently from the teaching workspace. Canonical-board multi-live composition remains blocked by unconfirmed source contracts and open display decisions.

Cloud records, protected shared content, completed protected replay, hardware history/snapshots, live credentials/subscriptions, MQTT details, and authoritative clocks have no concrete target adapter contract.

nodes.sourceRole: canonical-source evidence not adopted by the target
nodes.closure: The target uses static checks, typecheck, production build, audits, and narrow real-browser validation without automated-test files, infrastructure, scripts, fixtures, snapshots, or coverage.
